summary: Wikipedia MediaWiki REST API for public content retrieval, including page lookup, rendered HTML, full-text search, and revision-history metadata.

auth.instructions: Public read endpoints do not require an API key or OAuth token. Send a descriptive User-Agent (or Api-User-Agent) header per Wikimedia API policy. OAuth is only needed for user-authenticated actions outside this read-only content profile.

endpoints.name: search-page-content
endpoints.description: Searches Wikipedia page content and returns ranked page matches.

endpoints.name: search-page-title
endpoints.description: Searches page titles and returns matching Wikipedia titles.

endpoints.name: get-page-content
endpoints.description: Returns canonical page metadata and source content for a page title.

endpoints.name: get-page-html
endpoints.description: Returns Parsoid-generated HTML for a Wikipedia page title.

endpoints.name: get-page-history
endpoints.description: Returns revision-history metadata for a Wikipedia page title.
